description_long: This is a compact, carbine-style rifle with a dark metal receiver and barrel, complemented by wooden furniture on the handguard and pistol grip. The magazine is curved and appears to be made of a dark polymer or metal, typical of rifles inspired by the AK platform. The handguard and grip have a rich, reddish-brown wood finish, contrasting with the matte black metal components. The rifle features a short barrel, making it suitable for close-quarters or urban environments, and is equipped with basic iron sights. The muzzle has a slotted device, likely a flash hider, and the overall build is robust and utilitarian. The stock is minimal or absent, giving the weapon a compact profile.
description: A compact, AK-style rifle with a short barrel, dark metal body, and reddish-brown wooden handguard and grip. It features a curved magazine and basic iron sights.
description_view_0: Front view showing the muzzle, flash hider, and the narrow profile of the handguard and barrel.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the curved magazine, wooden handguard, pistol grip, and the short barrel.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the back of the receiver and the end of the magazine, with minimal or no stock visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying the magazine, wooden handguard, and the compact, stockless rear.
